title: Fabric Workspace Request
description: Fabric Governance manifest. Naming and structure rules defined in docs/governance-rules.md.

name.description: Lowercase. Pattern: <country>-<area>-<subject>-<dataProductType>-<env>-<suffix>. Each segment must also be declared explicitly so the validator can cross-check.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2 country code, lowercase. Must match the first segment of name.

area.description: Area responsible for the data product (2-4 lowercase chars). Must match the second segment of name.

subject.description: Subject describing the aspect of the data product (max 8 lowercase chars). Must match the third segment of name.

dataProductType.description: Type of data product. brz=bronze, slv=silver, gld=gold, ndf=non-differentiated. Must match the fourth segment of name.

environment.description: Environment. Must match the fifth segment of name.

suffix.description: Random ID (1-6 lowercase alphanumeric chars) ensuring uniqueness. Must match the sixth segment of name.

domain.description: Fabric domain. Pattern: dom-<area>-<product>. Must be in policy.approvedDomains.

capacity.description: Logical capacity name from rules/policy.yaml allow-list

groupName.description: Optional. If set on a Group owner, must follow grp_<service>_<env>_<area>_<role>.
